generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/dtdf#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoUST10LXLiDARData
]
instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for visual data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCameraData
]
instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]
instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle sensor",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringAngleData
]
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDARData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]
instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]
instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]
instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]
instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]
instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN model for point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]
instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter model for tracking",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]
instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]
instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data stored in SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, VehicleSteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]
instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks data stored in SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]
instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and software stack",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between components",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL for data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Point cloud processing enabler using DBSCAN and Kalman filter",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic enabler",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for data monitoring service",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote management service",
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service providing real-time visualization and reporting",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateDataInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, ProjectedPathInsight
]
instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service for ACC system offloaded to DT",
    DTDFVocab:provides ProjectedPathInsight
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service for enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking via UI",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data for monitoring"
]
instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Object tracks for monitoring"
]
instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path for monitoring"
]

]

    base:desc "Disable ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

    base:desc "Motor for speed control"
]
instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [

]
instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Actuation Functional Entity converting desired speed to motor voltage commands and steering commands"
]

    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle",

]

]

    base:desc "ROS2 package for User Entity"
]

]

    base:desc "Case-based generalization for requirements definition"
]
instance ISO23247RA : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Reference Architecture for architectural design"
]

]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands including desired speed converted to motor voltage, steering adjustments, and emergency braking signals to the physical vehicle."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "End-to-end latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for real-time operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data processing), User Entity (3D visualization and control panel), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase for real-time monitoring and control, and design phase for cyber-physical experimentation and requirement validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with ≤100 ms latency; Data Translation FE handles serialization and unit conversion."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hybrid deployment: Physical Twin Entity on vehicle-mounted Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity components in cloud for computation offloading."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture adopted for digital twin development."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system design with latency constraints; no explicit security measures detailed in document."
]
